PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Some things I've built lately.
PROJECTS.GENQ_DESCRIPTION: GenQ is an educational web application developed to digitize academic content and reduce the use of physical materials in learning processes. The platform allows users to create, manage, and share quizzes while incorporating artificial intelligence features to automatically generate questions. This solution simplifies assessment creation, optimizes the time required to prepare educational content, and improves access to learning resources.
PROJECTS.SHAPPER_DESCRIPTION: Shapper is an e-commerce web application developed for a bakery that wanted to create an online store to promote and sell its products through the web. The platform includes features such as product catalog management, order tracking, and an administrative module for managing users and products. The application is currently being adapted to a multi-tenant architecture, with improvements including file storage integration, card payment gateway support, and authentication through external providers.
PROJECTS.SWEET_ONION_DESCRIPTION: SweetOnion is an artificial intelligence user interface (frontend) designed to unify and integrate APIs, LLMs, and RAG systems, facilitating their consumption and experimentation. The ecosystem includes a REST API that manages the selection of providers, models, contexts, and instructions, along with an interactive graphical panel to manage model configurations, log conversation history in a database, and perform real-time tests.
